mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{status}, '%')
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_id, create_time, status, category, product_name, amount, receiver_name, receiver_address, tracking_no, logistics_company, user_id) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{createTime}, #{status}, #{category}, #{productName}, #{amount}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverAddress}, #{trackingNo}, #{logisticsCompany}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET create_time = #{createTime}, status = #{status}, category = #{category}, product_name = #{productName}, amount = #{amount}, receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
